debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
⊢ M.encard ≤ @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G

proof:
apply le_csSup
  · use ⊤
    intro n hn
    exact le_top
  · exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
failed_attempts:
apply le_csSup
  · use V(G).encard
    intro n hn
    obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hn
    sorry
  · exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup_of_le _ ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ le_rfl
  use ⊤
  intro _ _
  exact le_top

apply le_csSup
  · use V(G).encard
    intro n hn
    obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hn
    sorry
  · exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup
  · use ⊤
    intro n hn
    exact le_top
  · exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

  · use ⊤
    intro n hn
    exact le_top
  · exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup

    simp [hn]
